---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: 'feat: [short description]'
labels: feature, needs-spec
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. What should be built and why? -->

## Background / Motivation

<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? What happens if we don't build it? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- High-level description of the approach. Not a full spec — just enough to discuss. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Verifiable, testable criteria. Fill in before the spec is written. -->
- [ ] Given ..., when ..., then ...
- [ ] Given ..., when ..., then ...

## Services Affected

<!-- Which services in the monorepo are involved? -->
- [ ] `services/[name]`
- [ ] `apps/[name]`
- [ ] `packages/[name]`

## Spec File

<!-- Once the spec is written, link it here. Implementation CANNOT begin without this. -->
**Spec**: `docs/specs/[ISSUE-NUMBER]-[feature-name].md` (link once created)

## ADR Required?

<!-- Does this feature require an architectural decision? If yes, create an ADR in docs/adr/ -->
- [ ] Yes — ADR: `docs/adr/[NNNN]-[title].md` (link once created)
- [ ] No

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, links to related issues, external references -->

---

**Before implementation can start:**
- [ ] Spec file created and linked above
- [ ] ADR created (if needed) and linked above
- [ ] Plan approved (agent: ExitPlanMode; human: plan comment on this issue)
